editorial_warm.label: 暖色手绘信息图
editorial_warm.description: Hand-drawn editorial infographic with warm palette. Best for: product launches, how-to guides, adoption paths.
editorial_warm.global_style: Use baoyu-cover-image + baoyu-article-illustrator editorial-infographic style. Hand-drawn organic line quality with controlled imperfection.
editorial_warm.prompt_seed: Apply editorial-infographic with conceptual composition. Warm palette: cream base, coral accent, teal structure.

tech_blueprint.label: 科技蓝图
tech_blueprint.description: Clean tech blueprint with cool palette and precise lines. Best for: architecture, system design, technical deep-dives.
tech_blueprint.global_style: Technical blueprint style with precise geometry, grid alignment, and engineering clarity. No hand-drawn wobble.
tech_blueprint.prompt_seed: Apply tech-blueprint preset: dark background, precise lines, neon-accent nodes, engineering diagram clarity.

data_dashboard.label: 数据仪表盘
data_dashboard.description: Clean data visualization with charts and metrics. Best for: benchmarks, comparisons, ROI proof.
data_dashboard.global_style: Data-driven dashboard style with clean charts, metric cards, and comparison grids. Prioritize readability of numbers.
data_dashboard.prompt_seed: Apply data-dashboard preset: white background, clean chart lines, metric cards with large numbers, comparison grids.

bold_editorial.label: 锐评海报
bold_editorial.description: Typography-driven bold editorial poster. Best for: opinion pieces, contrarian takes, signal decode.
bold_editorial.global_style: Bold editorial poster style with strong typography, high contrast, and minimal illustration. The text IS the visual.
bold_editorial.prompt_seed: Apply bold-editorial preset: dark background, oversized Chinese typography as hero element, minimal icons, high contrast amber accent.

case_study.label: 案例拆解
case_study.description: Structured case study layout with before/after and evidence cards. Best for: failure analysis, success stories, pivots.
case_study.global_style: Case study card layout with clear before/after structure, evidence markers, and narrative progression. Documentary feel.
case_study.prompt_seed: Apply case-study preset: warm gray background, before/after split, evidence cards with red/green markers, documentary tone.
